overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long SATS Daily ETF (SATG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of EchoStar Corporation (Nasdaq: SATS) stock, less fees, and expenses. SATS provides satellite technology, services, and wireless connectivity solutions for consumers, enterprises, and governments. SATG was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
